modules.name: 战斗状态常驻菜单栏
modules.code: (function() { if (window._autoMenuDaemon) { console.log("🔄 插件已经在运行中了，无需重复执行！"); return; } console.log("🚀 全自动侧边栏守护进程已启动！进入战斗将自动加载UI..."); let _ROLE_KEY = null; function findSymbolKey(obj, description) { if (!obj) return null; let symbols = Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(obj); for (let sym of symbols) { if (sym.description === description) return sym; } return null; } function getRole(gamePanel) { if (!gamePanel) return null; if (!_ROLE_KEY) { _ROLE_KEY = findSymbolKey(gamePanel, 'role'); } if (_ROLE_KEY) return gamePanel[_ROLE_KEY]; if (gamePanel.role) return gamePanel.role; return null; } if (!window._gamingBypassPatched) { window._gamingBypassPatched = true; window._isUIOrNetAction = false; window._wrapBypass = function(fn, ctx, args) { let prev = window._isUIOrNetAction; window._isUIOrNetAction = true; try { return fn.apply(ctx, args); } finally { window._isUIOrNetAction = prev; } }; let hookTimer = setInterval(function() { if (window.pomelo && window.pomelo.request && !window.pomelo._isHookedReq) { window.pomelo._isHookedReq = true; let origReq = window.pomelo.request; window.pomelo.request = function(route, msg, cb) { let wrappedCb = cb; if (typeof cb === 'function') { wrappedCb = function() { return window._wrapBypass(cb, this, arguments); }; } return origReq.call(this, route, msg, wrappedCb); }; } if (window.pomelo && window.pomelo.on && !window.pomelo._isHookedOn) { window.pomelo._isHookedOn = true; let origOn = window.pomelo.on; window.pomelo.on = function(route, cb) { let wrappedCb = cb; if (typeof cb === 'function') { wrappedCb = function() { return window._wrapBypass(cb, this, arguments); }; } return origOn.call(this, route, wrappedCb); }; } if (window.Laya && window.Laya.EventDispatcher && window.Laya.EventDispatcher.prototype.event && !window.Laya.EventDispatcher.prototype._isHookedEvt) { window.Laya.EventDispatcher.prototype._isHookedEvt = true; let origEvent = window.Laya.EventDispatcher.prototype.event; window.Laya.EventDispatcher.prototype.event = function(type, data) { if (type === 'click' || type === 'mousedown' || type === 'mouseup') { return window._wrapBypass(origEvent, this, arguments); } return origEvent.apply(this, arguments); }; clearInterval(hookTimer); } }, 100); } function injectMenu(gameScene) { if (window._hackedMenu && !window._hackedMenu.destroyed) return; Laya.loader.load("prefab/hallHead.lh", Laya.Handler.create(this, function(prefab) { if (!gameScene || gameScene.destroyed) return; if (window._hackedMenu && !window._hackedMenu.destroyed) return; let menu = prefab.create(); window._hackedMenu = menu; gameScene.addChild(menu); menu.parentPanel = gameScene; menu.skin = null; menu.graphics.clear(); menu.texture = null; let keepButtons = []; for (let i = menu.numChildren - 1; i >= 0; i--) { let child = menu.getChildAt(i); if (child.x >= 180 && child.width < 150) { child.visible = true; keepButtons.push(child); } else { child.removeSelf(); } } keepButtons.sort(function(a, b) { return a.x - b.x; }); let startX = 2; let startY = 150; let scaleRatio = 0.65; keepButtons.forEach(function(btn) { btn.x = startX; btn.y = startY; btn.scaleX = scaleRatio; btn.scaleY = scaleRatio; startY += (btn.height * scaleRatio) + 5; }); menu.pos(0, 0); menu.zOrder = 99999; console.log("✨ 检测到新战斗场景，侧边栏挂载成功！"); })); } window._autoMenuDaemon = setInterval(function() { let currentGameScene = null; function findScene(node) { if (currentGameScene) return; if (node && node.gamePanel && node.infoPanel && node.mapInfo && !node.destroyed) { currentGameScene = node; return; } if (node && node._children) { for (let i = 0; i < node._children.length; i++) findScene(node._children[i]); } } if (window.Laya && window.Laya.stage) { findScene(window.Laya.stage); } if (currentGameScene && currentGameScene.gamePanel) { let currentRole = getRole(currentGameScene.gamePanel); if (currentRole && !currentRole._gamingPatched) { currentRole._gamingPatched = true; let originalGaming = currentRole.gaming; Object.defineProperty(currentRole, 'gaming', { get: function() { if (window._isUIOrNetAction) return false; return this._realGaming !== undefined ? this._realGaming : originalGaming; }, set: function(val) { this._realGaming = val; } }); console.log("✨ 成功接管底层角色实例，背包/寄售拦截已粉碎！"); } } if (currentGameScene) { if (!window._hackedMenu || window._hackedMenu.destroyed || window._hackedMenu.parent !== currentGameScene) { injectMenu(currentGameScene); } } else { if (window._hackedMenu && !window._hackedMenu.destroyed) { window._hackedMenu = null; } } }, 1000); })();

modules.name: 全局寄售售出提醒
